data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for 'First-time customer only'.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'First-time customer only', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for first-time customer discounts, but there are no specific details or endpoints that demonstrate how this requirement is implemented or validated. This leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or validation for 'First-time customer only' discounts.
